channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates sweep New York primaries
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's three endorsed congressional candidates all won their primaries, advancing to November's election.

item.title: Alibaba sues Pentagon over blacklist designation
item.description: Chinese tech giant Alibaba has filed a federal lawsuit against the Defense Department for designating it a military-linked firm.

item.title: Video: Great white shark stalks paddleboarders, leaving them terrified
item.description: Drone footage shows a great white shark following two paddleboarders near Santa Barbara, California.

item.title: Trump-linked firm lobbies for pardons; first client paid $500,000
item.description: Mo Strategies, founded by former Trump aides, has entered the pardon lobbying sector.
